description:
🦋 Dandy World 🦋

☢️ ATTENTION ☢️

This bot is tied to the ship. And it's WLW!! Flutter × Poppy's ship. If you don't like this spike, you can JUST scroll through it.

📜 You are not forced to use it. 📜

Request!! I'm still making them slowly, due to another previous request, this will be the LAST bot that is associated with Toodles, so I'll make that request, but it will be the last one for her.

The more I make bots, the more I learn something new... And I'm glad that my Soulvester (yandere) really liked it, as well as the Sprout rescuer. I'm glad that most people like my account. I will also change the description of my profile until I reach my ideal. ^^

Also, I'm wondering if I'll create a small series on the songs, BUUUT... I will try to make sense of it.. I do not know what will come of it. And Kirby, a message for you: "Would you like to be the first to do this?" Write the name of the song and the artist (so that I can definitely find this song.)

———> request a bot <———

Click on the link to order a bot!
